title: amoc-utac v0.1.0: UTAC Analysis of Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation Tipping
description: amoc-utac v0.1.0 applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC), a major tipping element of the Earth climate system. The UTAC-Logistic ODE identifies critical thresholds in AMOC strength time series, enabling early-warning detection of potential collapse events. CREP metrics characterise coherence and emergence in thermohaline circulation dynamics. Part of the GenesisAeon UTAC application suite (genesis-os). Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
